name: Sho Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Sho Shogi (小将棋, 'small/old shogi'): the 16th-century predecessor of modern Shogi on a 9x9 board. Same setup, plus a Drunk Elephant in front of each king that promotes to a Crown Prince (a second king you must also capture) -- but with NO drops (captured pieces leave play). Win by mating your opponent's sole royal, or by baring their king.
